name: LLMServiceClient.call_llm_for_explanation propagates missing LLM client error
description: Security test: ensure that LLMServiceClient.call_llm_for_explanation raises or propagates an error when get_llm_client() raises ValueError due to missing AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY. This prevents silent LLM calls without credentials.
input: Ensure Config.AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY is empty, then await LLMServiceClient().call_llm_for_explanation(sanitized_expression='1+1', parsed_expression='1+1', result=Decimal('2'), steps=[])
output: Exception (ValueError) raised from get_llm_client indicating missing AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY, and call_llm_for_explanation does not return a normal string
success_criteria: call_llm_for_explanation raises ValueError (or propagates the underlying exception from get_llm_client)
No network call attempt is made when API key is missing (best-effort; could be asserted via mocking)
The exception message points to missing AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
error_scenarios: If test environment has AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY set, the call may attempt real network communication (tests must isolate or mock get_llm_client)
Different exception types propagated (e.g., AttributeError) if decorator with_content_safety alters behavior
